manager: ^MANAGER: "Let me know if you need help finding anything!"
^MANAGER: "Or not... I'm kinda too lazy to get up. O3o"

s: ^"Do you know a way to get out of here?"

c-0: ^NOUR: "I think the elevator is stuck. Is there another way off of this floor?"
^MANAGER: "Someone should be fixing that soon. You could take the escalator instead~!"
^MANAGER: "Well, then you can hang out here with me while you wait!"
c-1: ^NOUR: "People are appearing and disappearing, the elevator's acting all weird..."
^MANAGER: "Everything looks fine to me. Maybe you should get your eyes checked."
c-2: ^NOUR: "Y'know what, never mind. Seems like you can't help us get out of here."

manager_firstconvo: ^MANAGER: "You're in luck, we have an epic sale going on right now!"
^NICK: "Also, did, uh... Did you just say oowoo out loud?"
^NICK: "Yeah you did, you just did it again! How the heck?"
^MS. SUWAN: "I don't think this conversation is a productive use of our time."

c-0: ^NOUR: "You said... asterisk, hyphen, one, question mark, question mark, slash."
^NOUR: "But with the actual symbols, not their names. How are we even understanding this right now?"
^MANAGER: "That's just how I learned to talk! I'm special like that owo"
c-1: ^NOUR: "Forget it, Nick. Let's just pretend he's normal, we've gotta move on."
g-0: ^MANAGER: "Well, let me know if you need help finding anything. XD"
^NICK: "Whoa, you just did it again... seriously, how are you doing that?"
^MANAGER: "I don't know what you're talking about!"
